known_issues.title: JournalHierarchy.create_entry returns None
known_issues.description: The JournalHierarchy.create_entry method sometimes returns None instead of the expected tuple (entry_id, journal_id, year_id, month_id). This is a pre-existing issue not introduced by the backend abstraction layer.
known_issues.mitigation: Tests marked as xfail to prevent false failures

recommendations: Fix JournalHierarchy.create_entry in a separate epic focused on journal functionality
Add integration test CI workflow that runs when AnyType/Notion credentials available
Increase coverage for CLI modules through more comprehensive integration tests
